versions.name: S-F Scout Ranch
versions.summary: Sprawling 5,200-acre Greater St. Louis Area Council ranch on 270-acre Nims Lake near Farmington, Missouri, offering Scouts BSA resident camp in two styles—air-conditioned dining or patrol-method campsite cooking. Features aquatics, Huck's Cove water park, Eagle Range shooting sports, STEM, rock climbing/challenge course, and the APEX older-Scout track.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). verified_at is camp-finder's own source-confirmation date; imported_at is when open-scout-api ingested it. The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
